name: Cây Súng Ngàn Năm
desc:
When your opponent activates a card or effect while this card is in your hand (Quick Effect): You can pay 1000 LP; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card. Then, look at your opponent's hand, and if you do, choose 1 card from it and discard it.
If this activated card's effect is negated by your opponent's card effect: You win the Duel.
You can only activate 1 "Cây Súng Ngàn Năm" per turn.
